summary: Industry-standard listing and transaction data exchange model for MLS and prop-tech interoperability.
sync_scope: Listings, member records, media metadata, open house feeds, and standards-aligned field mappings.

config_fields.name: base_url
config_fields.label: API Base URL
config_fields.help_text: MLS or vendor endpoint for the licensed feed.

config_fields.name: client_id
config_fields.label: Client ID
config_fields.help_text: Issued by the MLS or data vendor.

config_fields.name: client_secret
config_fields.label: Client Secret
config_fields.help_text: Stored for the local demo only.

config_fields.name: resource_scope
config_fields.label: Resource Scope
config_fields.help_text: Example: Property, Member, Media.

summary: Standardized property data packaging for faster field alignment across MLS software and connected tools.
sync_scope: Listing form autofill, media import, normalized field transfer, and standardized payload translation.

config_fields.name: feed_name
config_fields.label: Feed Name
config_fields.help_text: Human-readable connector label.

config_fields.name: partner_contact
config_fields.label: Partner Contact
config_fields.help_text: Operations or vendor owner for the feed.

config_fields.name: data_license_id
config_fields.label: License Identifier
config_fields.help_text: Optional internal contract or license ID.

summary: Licensed listing feed and metadata access used to distribute MLS data to broker, portal, and software consumers.
sync_scope: Listing feeds, lookup metadata, portal syndication support, and normalized distribution endpoints.

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: API Key
config_fields.help_text: Vendor-issued key for licensed access.

config_fields.name: account_name
config_fields.label: Account Name
config_fields.help_text: Brokerage or vendor account label.

config_fields.name: pull_schedule
config_fields.label: Pull Schedule
config_fields.help_text: Suggested sync cadence for the demo.

summary: Property intelligence, public records, ownership, valuation, and location enrichment APIs.
sync_scope: Property detail enrichment, valuations, neighborhood context, tax data, and public-record overlays.

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: API Key
config_fields.help_text: ATTOM developer key.

config_fields.name: lookup_region
config_fields.label: Preferred Region
config_fields.help_text: Optional region or state focus.

config_fields.name: enrichment_enabled
config_fields.label: Enable enrichment sync
config_fields.help_text: Toggle property enrichment for internal workflows.

summary: Lead, contact, company, and pipeline synchronization for marketing and sales handoff.
sync_scope: Lead creation, contact sync, pipeline stage updates, and routing metadata export.

config_fields.name: portal_id
config_fields.label: Portal ID
config_fields.help_text: HubSpot account identifier.

config_fields.name: private_app_token
config_fields.label: Private App Token
config_fields.help_text: Use a sandbox token for local testing only.

config_fields.name: default_pipeline
config_fields.label: Default Pipeline
config_fields.help_text: Pipeline or stage label for inbound leads.

summary: Real-estate-focused lead management sync for agents, action plans, and pipeline updates.
sync_scope: Lead capture, assigned-agent handoff, source tracking, and note synchronization.

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: API Key
config_fields.help_text: Use a dedicated sandbox or demo key.

config_fields.name: team_slug
config_fields.label: Team Slug
config_fields.help_text: Internal team or office label.

config_fields.name: sync_notes
config_fields.label: Sync lead notes
config_fields.help_text: Include assistant notes when exporting leads.

summary: SMS and voice workflow support for follow-up, notifications, and click-to-call experiences.
sync_scope: Outbound SMS, inbound message webhooks, call routing, and notification automation.

config_fields.name: account_sid
config_fields.label: Account SID
config_fields.help_text: Twilio account identifier.

config_fields.name: auth_token
config_fields.label: Auth Token
config_fields.help_text: Stored for demo use only.

config_fields.name: from_number
config_fields.label: Primary From Number
config_fields.help_text: Phone number used for outbound outreach.

summary: Address normalization, geocoding, reverse geocoding, and location lookup support.
sync_scope: Address validation, geocoding, search normalization, and map pin enrichment.

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: API Key
config_fields.help_text: Restrict the key by IP or service in production.

config_fields.name: region_bias
config_fields.label: Region Bias
config_fields.help_text: Example: us or tx for address parsing hints.

config_fields.name: strict_validation
config_fields.label: Require normalized addresses
config_fields.help_text: Use the connector to validate incoming addresses.

summary: Scheduling automation for tours, consultations, and follow-up booking flows.
sync_scope: Meeting link generation, booking sync, availability lookup, and webhook-driven updates.

config_fields.name: access_token
config_fields.label: Access Token
config_fields.help_text: Personal access token for the demo account.

config_fields.name: organization_uri
config_fields.label: Organization URI
config_fields.help_text: Calendly organization URI or user URI.

config_fields.name: event_type
config_fields.label: Default Event Type
config_fields.help_text: Tour type or consultation label.

summary: Digital signature and real-estate transaction coordination workflows.
sync_scope: Envelope creation, signer routing, Rooms coordination, and document status updates.

config_fields.name: integration_key
config_fields.label: Integration Key
config_fields.help_text: DocuSign application key.

config_fields.name: account_id
config_fields.label: Account ID
config_fields.help_text: DocuSign account or demo account ID.

config_fields.name: rsa_private_key
config_fields.label: Private Key
config_fields.help_text: Only populate for a local integration experiment.

summary: Payments, deposits, and billing workflow support for applications that handle fees or reservation charges.
sync_scope: Checkout links, deposit capture, receipts, reconciliation events, and payment status updates.

config_fields.name: secret_key
config_fields.label: Secret Key
config_fields.help_text: Use a test-mode key in non-production environments.

config_fields.name: webhook_signing_secret
config_fields.label: Webhook Signing Secret
config_fields.help_text: Required when receiving Stripe events.

config_fields.name: payment_mode
config_fields.label: Payment Mode
config_fields.help_text: Keep this on test for the local demo.
